title: linanthus androsaceus subsp. croceus
intro: Linanthus androsaceus subsp. croceus, also known as Croceus Rock Jasmine, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Polemoniaceae family. The plant is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Croceus Rock Jasmine include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
